description: A partner has sent a raw CAD export of a proprietary airfoil ('Project_Falcon_Foil') in a non-standard CSV format located at '~/Documents/incoming/project_falcon_foil.csv'. Convert this file into a standard Selig format (Name on line 1, X Y coordinates on subsequent lines, whitespace separated, no commas, indices, or Z-values) and import it into QBlade's Airfoil Design module. Save the resulting QBlade project to '~/Documents/projects/falcon_design.wpa'.
